title: field layout
text: field layout A property of a field that defines how the data in a field is formatted for display. For example, the layout of the day, month, and year in a date field can be displayed in different formats, such as: TUE-18-JUL-2014, 18/07/14, 18-JUL-14. Related Links Field Layout Property that specifies how the field's data is formatted for display. The value can be a comma-separated list of shorthand codes, or a reference to a modeled field layout.
